title: Rivian rolls out ‘Hey Rivian’ AI assistant with full vehicle control
description:
Rivian is rolling out its new AI-powered voice assistant to all Gen 1 and Gen 2 R1 owners as part of its latest over-the-air software update. The feature, activated by saying “Hey Rivian” or holding the left steering wheel button, requires an active Connect+ subscription.

title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
description: OpenAI's CEO recalls a "particularly hair-raising" conversation with the SpaceX founder.

title: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
description: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.

title: The AI legal services industry is heating up — Anthropic is getting in on the action
description: Anthropic's new tools are designed to help law firms automate specific clerical functions — things like document search and review, case law resources, deposition prep, document drafting, and other related areas.

title: World Models: 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now
description: World models recently made our list of 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now. Watch executive editor Niall Firth explain why this emerging area of AI is gaining so much attention. title: Waymo recalls 3,791 robotaxis over flooded road incident, deploying OTA software fix
description:
Waymo has filed a voluntary recall with the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) covering 3,791 robotaxis after one of its vehicles drove into a flooded road in San Antonio last month. No one was injured.



The key detail: the recall is a software fix that will be deployed over th

title: Waymo issues recall to deal with a flooding problem
description: Waymo has issued a software recall that makes its robotaxis more cautious around flooded areas. A "final remedy" is in the works.

title: Once again, SpaceX has set a new record for the tallest rocket ever built

description: The Helios platform is now available to customers through Quantinuum’s cloud service and on-premises offering. It has 98 Physical Qubits and 50 logical qubits with very low error rates. title: Ilya Sutskever Stands by His Role in Sam Altman’s OpenAI Ouster: ‘I Didn’t Want It to Be Destroyed’
description: The former OpenAI chief scientist may be estranged from the company, but he still came to its defense as he testified on Monday.

title: RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands
description:
RLWRLD said with RLDX-1, it aimed to include things like context memorization or force sensing, which existing models often lack.
The post RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands appeared first on The Robot Report.

title: SpaceX Starship Flight 12 Successful Wet Rehearsal
description: SpaceX has its second attempt to conduct a Wet Dress Rehearsal (WDR) for the Flight 12 full stack vehicle (Booster 19 and Ship 39) today. The Wet dress rehearsal was good. title: Musk v. Altman week 2: OpenAI fires back, and Shivon Zilis reveals that Musk tried to poach Sam Altman
description: In the second week of the landmark trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI, Musk’s motivations for bringing the suit were under scrutiny. title: Nyobolt raises funding to bring fast charging to more robots
description:
Nyobolt has grown its revenue fivefold year over year as its high-efficiency power systems enable greater robot performance.
The post Nyobolt raises funding to bring fast charging to more robots appeared first on The Robot Report.

title: Nuro secures California driverless permit for Lucid Gravity Uber robotaxis
description:
Nuro has received a permit from the California Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV) to test its Lucid Gravity SUVs without a human safety driver on public roads — a critical milestone before the company can launch Uber’s planned robotaxi service later this year.

title: Rocket Lab announces large launch contract and plans to acquire space robotics company
description: Rocket Lab announced May 7 the largest launch contract in the company’s history as it also moves to acquire a space robotics company.

title: SpaceX V3 Booster Has a Full Static Fire And Is On Track for a May 15 Launch
description: Full duration and full thrust 33-engine static fire with Super Heavy V3. This means the updated deluge system is working properly. title: Hugging Face launches agentic toolkit for Reachy Mini
description:
Users describe the behavior they'd like to see in plain English, and the agent writes, tests, and ships the code to Reachy Mini.
